title: Making table style response in workforms
excerpt: Does Monday.com’s workforms have an equivalent to Jotform’s configurable list. I have a couple of questions that need a user to be able to provide a list with columns of certain data types

posts.author: nickhall (Nick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does Monday.com’s workforms have an equivalent to Jotform’s configurable list. I have a couple of questions that need a user to be able to provide a list with columns of certain data types
